question_patterns: tieu chuan vi sinh cap sach c
gioi han vi sinh cap sach c
answer: Tieu chuan tham khao vi sinh cho cap sach C: Air sample 100 CFU/m3; settle plate 50 CFU/4h; contact plate 25 CFU/plate; glove print khong ap dung.

question_patterns: tieu chuan vi sinh cap sach b
gioi han vi sinh cap sach b
answer: Tieu chuan tham khao vi sinh cho cap sach B: Air sample 10 CFU/m3; settle plate 5 CFU/4h; contact plate 5 CFU/plate; glove print 5 CFU/glove.

question_patterns: tieu chuan vi sinh cap sach a
gioi han vi sinh cap sach a
answer: Tieu chuan tham khao vi sinh cho cap sach A: Air sample <1 CFU/m3; settle plate <1 CFU/4h; contact plate <1 CFU/plate; glove print <1 CFU/glove.

question_patterns: tieu chuan vi sinh cap sach d
gioi han vi sinh cap sach d
answer: Tieu chuan tham khao vi sinh cho cap sach D: Air sample 200 CFU/m3; settle plate 100 CFU/4h; contact plate 50 CFU/plate; glove print khong ap dung.

question_patterns: sop danh gia nha cung cap
quy trinh danh gia nha cung cap
answer: Dap an: Nha cung cap can co SOP danh gia va phe duyet, gom tieu chi GMP/phap ly, danh gia rui ro, tai danh gia dinh ky, xu ly sai lech/CAPA, change control va luu vet theo ALCOA+.

question_patterns: kiem soat nhiet do kho thuoc
quy trinh nhiet do bao quan thuoc
answer: Dap an: Quy trinh kiem soat nhiet do GDP/GSP can gom mapping, vi tri logger hop ly, nguong canh bao/hanh dong, xu ly excursion, dieu tra nguyen nhan goc, CAPA va bao cao dinh ky cho QA.
Dap an: ALCOA+ gom Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate va bo sung Complete, Consistent, Enduring, Available. Day la nen tang data integrity trong GMP/GxP.

Dap an: Quy trinh deviation/CAPA can gom ghi nhan sai lech, danh gia muc do anh huong, dieu tra nguyen nhan goc, de xuat hanh dong khac phuc-phong ngua, phe duyet, theo doi hieu luc va luu vet day du.
Dap an: Change control can xac dinh de xuat thay doi, danh gia tac dong GMP/validation/regulatory, phe duyet truoc khi thuc hien, cap nhat tai lieu-dao tao va danh gia hieu luc sau thay doi.
Dap an: Validation protocol thuong gom muc tieu, pham vi, trach nhiem, tieu chi chap nhan, phuong phap, mau bieu ghi nhan, xu ly sai lech, ket luan va yeu cau phe duyet.

Dap an: Temperature mapping can xac dinh worst-case locations, bo tri logger hop ly, thoi gian/chu ky do du lieu, tieu chi chap nhan, xu ly excursion va danh gia tinh dong deu nhiet do cua khu vuc bao quan.

question_patterns: thoi gian ton tru ban dau
answer: Dap an: Hold time phai duoc thiet lap va bao ve bang du lieu tham dinh/chung minh tinh on dinh phu hop, khong nen ap dat mot con so co dinh neu khong co bang chung quy trinh va san pham cu the.

question_patterns: tham dinh ve sinh gom gi
answer: Dap an: Cleaning validation can xac dinh worst-case, gioi han chap nhan residue/vi sinh/chat tay rua, vi tri lay mau, phuong phap swab-rinse, so lan lap lai va ly do khoa hoc cho cach tinh gioi han.
